## How To Test

1. Pull this branch
2. Run backend and frontend
3. Verify:
   - [ ] Dashboard loads
   - [ ] Chart loads and timeframe works
   - [ ] Watchlist add/remove works
   - [ ] Paper trade executes
   - [ ] Journal updates
